masculine_humanoid_to_feminine_humanoid: Your original body begins reshaping into a feminine version of the {toName} form. Your chest fills out, your waist draws in, your hips round, and your face softens. Your hair, posture, clothing, and movements all change to suit the new body.
Your body shifts towards the {toName} form, taking on a feminine shape as your chest, waist, hips, face, hair, clothing, and posture change together.
Your frame softens and reshapes into the {toName} form, gaining a feminine silhouette while your face, stance, outfit, and movements adjust around it.
masculine_humanoid_to_feminine_creature: Your original body begins reshaping into a feminine creature version of the {toName} form. Your chest fills out, your waist draws in, your hips round, and your face softens as less-human traits begin to emerge.
Your body shifts into the {toName} form, gaining a feminine shape while creature-like features, posture, clothing, and movement begin to take over.
Your frame softens into a feminine silhouette as the {toName} form pulls you away from ordinary humanity and into something stranger.
masculine_humanoid_to_small_feminine_hum: Your original body shrinks and reshapes into a smaller feminine version of the {toName} form. Your proportions become lighter, neater, and more delicate as the new body settles in.
Your frame draws inward, becoming smaller and more feminine as the {toName} form changes your face, posture, clothing, and movements.
Your body compresses into a petite feminine shape, adjusting your proportions and stance to match the {toName} form.
masculine_humanoid_to_non_humanoid_objec: Your original body begins losing its human shape as the {toName} transformation takes over. Your proportions compress and simplify, leaving ordinary limbs, posture, and movement behind.
Your body pulls inward and stops following a human outline, reshaping into the simpler object-like form of {toName}.
Your human frame collapses into a non-humanoid shape, your limbs and posture giving way as the {toName} form takes over.
masculine_humanoid_to_animal_object: Your original body begins losing its human shape as the {toName} transformation takes over. Your proportions shrink, round, and simplify into a toy-like animal object form.
Your body pulls into a smaller animal-shaped object, losing human posture and movement as the {toName} form settles in.
Your human outline compresses into a toy-like animal shape, your limbs and stance simplifying into the {toName} form.

Your {fromName} shape is rewritten into the {toName} form, keeping a feminine frame while everything else changes around it.

Your creature-like details recede as the {toName} form gives you a more human feminine shape again.
